name: Xencor Inc
summary: PART I A. Overview We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering and developing engineered antibody therapeutics to treat patients with cancer and autoimmune diseases, who have unmet medical needs. We use our protein engineering capabilities to design new technologies and XmAb drug candidates with improved properties and multi-target mechanisms of action.
